'''somakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:waddly|waddly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-m-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waddly|waddly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| somakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:somakithi|somakithi]] || [[word:somakiji|somakiji]] || [[word:somakishi|somakishi]] || [[word:somakiki|somakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:somakuthuthu|somakuthuthu]] || [[word:somakujuju|somakujuju]] || [[word:somakushushu|somakushushu]] || [[word:somakukuku|somakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:somakuthu|somakuthu]] || [[word:somakuju|somakuju]] || [[word:somakushu|somakushu]] || [[word:somakuku|somakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:somakufthuf|somakufthuf]] || [[word:somakufjuf|somakufjuf]] || [[word:somakufshuf|somakufshuf]] || [[word:somakufkuf|somakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:somakethe|somakethe]] || [[word:somakeje|somakeje]] || [[word:somakeshe|somakeshe]] || [[word:somakeke|somakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:somakothotho|somakothotho]] || [[word:somakojojo|somakojojo]] || [[word:somakoshosho|somakoshosho]] || [[word:somakokoko|somakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:somakotho|somakotho]] || [[word:somakojo|somakojo]] || [[word:somakosho|somakosho]] || [[word:somakoko|somakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:somakofthof|somakofthof]] || [[word:somakofjof|somakofjof]] || [[word:somakofshof|somakofshof]] || [[word:somakofkof|somakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:somakÃŸfthÃŸf|somakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:somakÃŸfjÃŸf|somakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:somakÃŸfshÃŸf|somakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:somakÃŸfkÃŸf|somakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:somakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|somakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:somakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|somakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:somakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|somakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:somakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|somakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:somakÃŸfthÃŸf|somakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:somakÃŸfjÃŸf|somakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:somakÃŸfshÃŸf|somakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:somakÃŸfkÃŸf|somakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:somakÃŸfthÃŸf|somakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:somakÃŸfjÃŸf|somakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:somakÃŸfshÃŸf|somakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:somakÃŸfkÃŸf|somakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:somakÃḊthÃḊ|somakÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:somakÃḊjÃḊ|somakÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:somakÃḊshÃḊ|somakÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:somakÃḊkÃḊ|somakÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:somakathatha|somakathatha]] || [[word:somakajaja|somakajaja]] || [[word:somakashasha|somakashasha]] || [[word:somakakaka|somakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:somakatha|somakatha]] || [[word:somakaja|somakaja]] || [[word:somakasha|somakasha]] || [[word:somakaka|somakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:somakafthaf|somakafthaf]] || [[word:somakafjaf|somakafjaf]] || [[word:somakafshaf|somakafshaf]] || [[word:somakafkaf|somakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:somakasha|somakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:somakshÃḋsha|somakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:somakrosha|somakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:somakmusha|somakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:somakyasha|somakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosomaknkshÃḋsha|gosomaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosomaknkrosha|gosomaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosomaknkmusha|gosomaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosomaknkyasha|gosomaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:somamakasha|somamakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:somamakshÃḋsha|somamakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:somamakrosha|somamakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:somamakmusha|somamakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:somamakyasha|somamakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosomamaknkshÃḋsha|gosomamaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosomamaknkrosha|gosomamaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosomamaknkmusha|gosomamaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosomamaknkyasha|gosomamaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:semÃḊkasha|semÃḊkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:semÃḊkshÃḋsha|semÃḊkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:semÃḊkrosha|semÃḊkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:semÃḊkmusha|semÃḊkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:semÃḊkyasha|semÃḊkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosemÃḊknkshÃḋsha|gosemÃḊknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosemÃḊknkrosha|gosemÃḊknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosemÃḊknkmusha|gosemÃḊknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosemÃḊknkyasha|gosemÃḊknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:somfakasha|somfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:somfakshÃḋsha|somfakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:somfakrosha|somfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:somfakmusha|somfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:somfakyasha|somfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosomfaknkshÃḋsha|gosomfaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosomfaknkrosha|gosomfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosomfaknkmusha|gosomfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosomfaknkyasha|gosomfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
